item.title: Analyst says interest in Epstein files plummeted after war on Iran launched
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Republican US Congressman Thomas Massie has said the war 'won’t make the Epstein files go away'.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: 'China's solution': Beijing touts Xi's governance plan amid global turmoil while raising concern over Iran
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Global conflicts over the past year have pushed the world towards a watershed moment, a spokesperson for China’s National People’s Congress said ahead of its annual meeting to be held from Mar 5 to 12.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Moderna agrees to pay up to $2.87 billion to settle Covid-19 vaccine patent dispute
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Under the deal, Moderna will pay US$950 million (S$1.21 billion) upfront in July 2026.
Matched: ai(+3), vaccine(+3), covid(+2)

item.title: Hundreds of drones target Kuwait, Iraq, Saudi Arabia, UAE amid Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
IRGC says the attacks are among its 'first powerful steps' as it continues strikes on US assets in Gulf countries.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Sri Lanka rescues 32 sailors from sunk Iranian warship
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
No information was immediately available on the cause of the explosion that sank the IRIS Dena, Foreign Minister Vijitha Herath said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: IRGC says Iran in ‘complete control’ of Strait of Hormuz amid Trump threats
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
One-fifth of the global oil is shipped through the strait, which remains effectively closed amid US-Israeli war on Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: How long can Israel sustain a military conflict with Iran?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Public support for Israel's war effort contrasts with doubts over its long-term military and economic sustainability.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘War of narratives’: Disinformation surges as conflict roils Middle East
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Since US and Israeli strikes ignited a regional conflict, a parallel information war has erupted.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Former Malaysian minister Rafizi's ex-aide a 'wanted' man to assist in probe over US$270 million government deal
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission said that it was tracking down Chai Jin Shern, also known as James Chai, and had appealed to the public to provide any information on his whereabouts.
Matched: corruption(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Netanyahu’s war alliance with Trump faces test as Iran crisis widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The two countries’ military campaigns have different objectives, a US official said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Ukraine's military drone guru says the next phase of Russia's Shahed war will be all about new extreme speeds
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Photographer in dispute over Vietnam War ‘Napalm Girl’ image sues Netflix
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The photographer Nick Ut said the film, The Stringer, had damaged his reputation.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hungary's opposition leads in polls, far-right party gains support
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BUDAPEST, March 4 - Hungary's centre-right Tisza party leads Prime Minister Viktor Orban's governing Fidesz before an April 12 election, while the far-right Our Homeland is gaining support, two opinion polls showed on Wednesday.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: South Korea’s stock market suffers biggest drop in history amid US-Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Benchmark index plummets as much as 12.2 percent, eclipsing single-day plunge after 9/11 attacks in 2001.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2)

item.title: Is the US at war with Iran, why did US, Israel attack Tehran?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Some of the main questions asked about the military developments in the Middle East, and what we know so far.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Protests in Venezuela against US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Protesters in Venezuela have rallied outside the Iranian Embassy to condemn the US-Israeli war on Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Oil on Fire: War impacts global energy markets
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Attacks on energy facilities, along with Iran blockading the Strait of Hormuz, are raising global oil and gas prices.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump commerce chief Howard Lutnick agrees to testify in congressional Epstein probe
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
He has faced pressure over his associations with the now-deceased Epstein.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump's national security team pushes war on Iran in Congress
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - U.S. President Donald Trump's top national security advisers spent much of the day on Tuesday making the case to Congress for the U.S.-Israel war on Iran, describing a rapidly evolving operation and leaving open the possibility of sending in American troops, Democrats and Trump's fellow Republicans said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump, Rubio offer conflicting reasons for US entry into Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Trump said Iran was going to strike first, while Rubio said Iran would react to an Israeli attack.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Apple raises MacBook Air and Pro prices in face of memory crunch
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Like other hardware manufacturers, Apple is contending with surging memory chip prices.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Pope Leo XIV issues warning to priests after noticing problematic trend in sermons: 'The brain needs to be used'
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Pentagon identifies first US soldiers killed in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
They were from the 103rd Sustainment Command out of Des Moines, Iowa.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
